requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 as International Baseline and ANM Conformity for Benin BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619 / IEC 62133作为国际基准及ANM合格评定在贝宁BESS项目验收中的地位
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619 / IEC 62133作為國際基準及ANM合格評定在貝寧BESS項目驗收中的地位

summary.en: Benin does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory pre-shipment BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route. ANM (Agence Nationale de Normalisation, de Métrologie et du Contrôle Qualité) is Benin's national standards body (ISO member, established by Order 2017-031, governed by Law 94-009 of 28 July 1994). ANM adopts IEC standards into the Beninese national standards catalogue and operates a national conformity marking scheme for products and services. The MCA-Bénin II programme (Millennium Challenge Account) has worked with ANM to promote adoption of IEC standards for off-grid electrification products, which includes battery storage components. IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected cell and module safety standard for stationary BESS. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Portable Applications) applies to smaller portable cells that may form part of off-grid and minigrid storage solutions. IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) is the expected system-level safety standard in donor-financed project specifications. Exporters should verify the current ANM catalogue of adopted IEC standards and any ANM conformity marking obligations before shipment.
summary.zh: 贝宁尚无经确认的独立强制性装运前BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径相当。ANM（国家标准化、计量与质量控制局）是贝宁国家标准机构（ISO成员，依据2017-031号令设立，受1994年7月28日第94-009号法律管辖）。ANM将IEC标准采纳入贝宁国家标准目录，并运营国家产品和服务合格标志制度。MCA-贝宁II计划（千年挑战账户）已与ANM合作推动离网电气化产品IEC标准的采纳，其中包括电池储能组件。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是固定式BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。IEC 62133（便携式应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）适用于可能构成离网和小型电网储能解决方案一部分的较小便携式电芯。IEC 62933-5-1:2024（储能系统——安全考量——危险识别、风险评估和风险缓解）是捐助方资助项目规格中预期的系统级安全标准。出口商在出货前应核实当前ANM采纳IEC标准目录及任何ANM合格标志义务。
summary.zht: 貝寧尚無經確認的獨立強制性裝運前BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑相當。ANM（國家標準化、計量與質量控制局）是貝寧國家標準機構（ISO成員，依據2017-031號令設立，受1994年7月28日第94-009號法律管轄）。ANM將IEC標準採納入貝寧國家標準目錄，並運營國家產品和服務合格標誌制度。MCA-貝寧II計劃（千年挑戰賬戶）已與ANM合作推動離網電氣化產品IEC標準的採納，其中包括電池儲能組件。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是固定式BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。IEC 62133（便攜式應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）適用於可能構成離網和小型電網儲能解決方案一部分的較小便攜式電芯。IEC 62933-5-1:2024（儲能系統——安全考量——危險識別、風險評估和風險緩解）是捐助方資助項目規格中預期的系統級安全標準。出口商在出貨前應核實當前ANM採納IEC標準目錄及任何ANM合格標誌義務。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Benin project specifications and donor-financed projects)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Portable Applications (applicable to smaller off-grid and minigrid battery storage components)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in donor-financed project specifications)

ANM (Agence Nationale de Normalisation, de Métrologie et du Contrôle Qualité) — Benin national standards body; ISO member; adopts IEC standards into Beninese catalogue; operates national conformity marking scheme — verify current catalogue and any pre-shipment conformity marking obligation directly with ANM
MCA-Bénin II / MCC — promoted IEC standard adoption for off-grid products including battery storage; donor project specifications reference IEC 62619 and IEC 62133

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalent in ANM conformity review, ARE licensing assessment, or donor-financed project specifications in Benin. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. For smaller off-grid battery storage products (minigrid), IEC 62133 test evidence from an accredited laboratory is also required alongside Chinese domestic standards.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被ANM合格评定审查、ARE许可评估或贝宁捐助方资助项目规格接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据。对于较小型离网电池储能产品（小型电网），还需提供来自认可实验室的IEC 62133测试证据，作为中国国内标准的补充。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被ANM合格評定審查、ARE許可評估或貝寧捐助方資助項目規格接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據。對於較小型離網電池儲能產品（小型電網），還需提供來自認可實驗室的IEC 62133測試證據，作為中國國內標準的補充。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Donor-financed project specifications (MCC, World Bank, AFD/Proparco) reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules in Benin. ANM's national conformity scheme adopts IEC standards; Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents. Exporters should: (a) verify the current ANM catalogue of adopted Beninese standards to confirm whether IEC 62619 has been formally adopted as a Beninese standard and whether ANM conformity marking is required before product import or sale; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Benin BESS projects; (c) for off-grid/minigrid battery components, also confirm IEC 62133 evidence obligations with ANM and the project owner; (d) confirm IEC 62933-5-1 system-level safety requirements with the donor or lender project specification before committing to a test programme; (e) verify heat tolerance and cycle-life specifications under Benin ambient temperature conditions (35–40 °C peak), as Chinese test-standard ambient (25 °C) may not reflect field conditions in Benin.
gap.zh: 关键差距：捐助方资助项目规格（MCC、世界银行、AFD/Proparco）将IEC 62619作为贝宁BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。ANM国家合格评定制度采纳IEC标准；中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被接受为等效依据。出口商应：（a）核实当前ANM采纳的贝宁标准目录，确认IEC 62619是否已正式采纳为贝宁标准，以及产品进口或销售前是否需要ANM合格标志；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至贝宁BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）对于离网/小型电网电池组件，还须向ANM和项目业主确认IEC 62133证据义务；（d）在启动测试计划前向捐助方或贷款机构项目规格确认IEC 62933-5-1系统级安全要求；（e）核实贝宁环境温度条件（峰值35–40°C）下的耐热性和循环寿命规格，因为中国测试标准环境（25°C）可能无法反映贝宁的现场条件。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：捐助方資助項目規格（MCC、世界銀行、AFD/Proparco）將IEC 62619作為貝寧BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。ANM國家合格評定制度採納IEC標準；中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被接受為等效依據。出口商應：（a）核實當前ANM採納的貝寧標準目錄，確認IEC 62619是否已正式採納為貝寧標準，以及產品進口或銷售前是否需要ANM合格標誌；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至貝寧BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）對於離網/小型電網電池組件，還須向ANM和項目業主確認IEC 62133證據義務；（d）在啟動測試計劃前向捐助方或貸款機構項目規格確認IEC 62933-5-1系統級安全要求；（e）核實貝寧環境溫度條件（峰值35–40°C）下的耐熱性和循環壽命規格，因為中國測試標準環境（25°C）可能無法反映貝寧的現場條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where donor or lender specifications (MCC, World Bank, AFD/Proparco) require IEC 62619 and/or IEC 62133 compliance; ANM national conformity marking obligations for BESS have not been confirmed from official public sources — verify directly with ANM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: ANM — Agence Nationale de Normalisation, de Métrologie et du Contrôle Qualité (Benin National Standards and Metrology Agency)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety pre-shipment regulation has been identified for Benin as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Benin donor-financed project specifications (MCC, World Bank, AFD/Proparco), and ANM adopts IEC standards into its national conformity scheme. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 alone are not sufficient for Benin project acceptance. Verify the current ANM adopted-standards catalogue and any conformity marking obligations directly with ANM. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and confirm all donor or lender EHS framework requirements before equipment procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，贝宁尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全装运前法规；然而，IEC 62619是贝宁捐助方资助项目规格（MCC、世界银行、AFD/Proparco）中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，且ANM将IEC标准采纳入国家合格评定制度。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足贝宁项目验收要求。直接向ANM核实当前ANM采纳标准目录及任何合格标志义务。从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据，并在设备采购前确认所有捐助方或贷款机构环境健康安全框架要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，貝寧尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全裝運前法規；然而，IEC 62619是貝寧捐助方資助項目規格（MCC、世界銀行、AFD/Proparco）中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，且ANM將IEC標準採納入國家合格評定制度。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足貝寧項目驗收要求。直接向ANM核實當前ANM採納標準目錄及任何合格標誌義務。從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據，並在設備採購前確認所有捐助方或貸款機構環境健康安全框架要求。
